data.title: Binance Assists in Global Takedown of Kidflix, a Major Child Exploitation Platform
data.description:
Binance has played a crucial role in the global dismantling of Kidflix, one of the largest child exploitation networks in history. The takedown was part of “Operation Stream,” a joint law enforcement initiative led by German and Dutch authorities and coordinated by Europol. On March 11, 2025, the Kidflix platform — which operated with nearly 1. 8 million registered users globally — was taken offline
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/24928682923402?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Binance Assists in Global Takedown of Kidflix, a Major Child Exploitation Platform
data.description: Binance has played a crucial role in the global dismantling of Kidflix, one of the largest child exploitation networks in history. The takedown was part of “Operation Stream,” a joint law enforcement initiative led by German and Dutch authorities and coordinated by Europol.On March 11, 2025, the Kidflix platform — which operated with nearly 1.8 million registered users globally — was taken offline. The operation involved 38 countries, resulting in arrests, device seizures, and the rescue of 39 children from ongoing abuse.Binance’s Contribution: Blockchain Intelligence and Operational SupportBinance’s Investigations Team collaborated closely with German authorities, offering blockchain analysis and operational intelligence that helped trace Kidflix’s cryptocurrency-based payment infrastructure. The platform monetized abuse by converting cryptocurrency payments into internal tokens, rewarding users for uploading, tagging, and validating child sexual abuse material (CSAM).Thanks to Binance's support, over 120 Kidflix users were successfully identified and linked to illicit transactions recorded on the blockchain.Operation Stream by the Numbers1,393 suspects identified79 arrests executed91,000 CSAM videos uncovered3,000+ electronic devices seized39 child victims rescuedVideos totaling 6,288 hours of footage uncoveredAverage upload rate: 3.5 new videos per hourThis operation marks Europol’s largest coordinated effort against online child sexual exploitation and highlights how digital forensics and blockchain traceability are changing the landscape of criminal investigations.Breaking the Myth of Crypto AnonymityWhile Kidflix relied on cryptocurrency for payments to ensure anonymity, the platform’s operators underestimated the transparency of blockchain networks. Contrary to popular belief, crypto transactions are pseudonymous, not anonymous — and when paired with blockchain analytics and KYC-compliant exchanges, they become traceable.Using blockchain forensics tools like Chainalysis and proprietary methods, Binance’s team helped law enforcement follow the crypto trail that eventually led to the platform’s exposure.Global Implications for Digital Crime Fighting“This case underscores how cryptocurrency can become a powerful tool not only for innovation but also for justice,” said [Binance representative or title, if desired]. “We remain committed to working alongside law enforcement agencies worldwide to ensure that bad actors have nowhere to hide.”By aiding in the identification and prosecution of exploiters, Binance has once again demonstrated the critical role of compliance, data sharing, and blockchain transparency in disrupting online criminal activity.

data.title: Ripple-acquired broker Hidden Road launches cryptocurrency OTC swap trading service in the United States
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hidden Road, a broker acquired by Ripple, launched an over-the-counter cryptocurrency swap trading service in the United States, allowing institutional investors to conduct large transactions settled in cash. The service is operated by a UK FCA-regulated entity and covers a variety of mainstream crypto assets. Ripple announced in April 2025 that it would acquire Hidden Road for US$1.25 billion. Hidden Road has obtained the US FINRA broker license and the EU MiCA license. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Binance Alpha to list LayerEdge (EDGEN) on June 2
data.description: Binance has announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature LayerEdge (EDGEN), with trading to open on June 2 2025, and the exact time to be announced. Eligible users will need to use Binance Alpha Points to claim their airdrop on the Alpha event page, which will be published on June 2 with the activity rules.

data.title: Australia's Monochrome Spot Bitcoin ETF Holdings Rise to 666 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official disclosure, Australia's Monochrome Spot Bitcoin ETF (IBTC) disclosed that as of May 29, its holdings had reached 666 bitcoins, and the market value of its holdings exceeded 111.5 million Australian dollars.

data.title: FLOCK went online on Upbit and rose by more than 25% within an hour. The locked position of gmFLOCK exceeded 40 million, and the foundation pledged 10 million tokens.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The decentralized AI training platform FLock.io token FLOCK was officially launched on the Korean mainstream exchange Upbit today. Influenced by the news, the price of FLOCK quickly rose by more than 25% within an hour after its launch.
On-chain data shows that as the popularity of the gmFLOCK pledge mechanism continues to rise, the cumulative locked-in amount has exceeded 40 million FLOCK. In addition, the FLock Foundation announced that it has pledged 10 million FLOCK for the longest period (365 days).

data.title: HyperLiquid Trader Liquidated for $100 Million After Bitcoin Bet Unravels
data.description:
A highly leveraged Bitcoin position on Hyperliquid was liquidated for over $100 million on Thursday, despite the asset's limited movement.
source: https://decrypt.co/322938/hyperliquid-trader-liquidated-100-million-bitcoin-bet-unravels

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$359 million yesterday, ending a 10-day streak of net inflows
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 29, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$359 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$125 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$49.00 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of US$166 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached US$11.62 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$128.127 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 6.07%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.985 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $91.9299 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 9 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 29, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$91.9299 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$50.4452 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.535 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$38.307 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.512 billion.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of US$4.6179 million. Currently, ETHE's total net outflow has reached US$4.29 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.632 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.02%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.975 billion.

data.title: OKX Wallet launched Cryptopedia’s 34th Echo protocol special event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX Wallet has launched the 34th Echo protocol special event on Cryptopedia. The event will be held from 15:00 on May 29, 2025 to 15:00 on June 28, 2025 (UTC+8). During this period, users can complete and verify the interactive tasks of the Echo protocol through Cryptopedia, and have the opportunity to share a token reward worth 1 million USDT.

data.title: Opinion: Actual savings from Musk's DOGE unit may be far less than $10 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Yesterday, Musk posted on X, "As my time as a special government employee is coming to an end, I want to thank President Trump for giving me this opportunity to cut wasteful spending. The mission of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will only strengthen over time because it will become a way of life for the entire government."
Analysis points out that advisory committees such as DOGE have no power to cut federal spending, close agencies or cancel contracts. Their recommendations must be implemented by the president or appointed officials, and most cost-cutting measures require congressional legislation. This means that Trump should have promoted legislation to legalize DOGE reforms, but he did not do so. The budget recently passed by the House of Representatives only approved $9.3 billion in agency cuts, less than 5% of Musk's initial $2 trillion annual cost-cutting target.
"DOGE is a big deal," said Jessica Riedl, a budget analyst at the Manhattan Institute. "The actual cost-cutting may be far less than $10 billion."
Political reality has exposed the essence of DOGE. This may be just a superficial cost-cutting show, and the "stubborn disease" of the federal budget has not been moved at all. Members of Congress have a firm grip on the various agencies of the executive branch, and even Republicans are reluctant to let "vigilantes" like Musk interfere with their territory. (Jin Shi)
